{{Quote|Risks equal opportunity. Experiments! Analysis! Conclusions! Fun!|4B-X|<ref name="Emergency in Escape Pod Four" />}}
'''4B-X''' ('''Forbee-X''') was a [[Gender/Legends|feminine]] [[science research droid]] affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], she accompanied [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Trux Zissu]], [[Stuart Zissu]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] on a [[Mission to Delantine|mission]] from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Delantine]] on board the ''[[Timespan]]''. When the ''Timespan'' was attacked by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] and Governor Zissu was captured, the remaining crew fled in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] which crashed on the planet [[Da'nor]], where they became stranded.

==Characteristics==
4B-X,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|359|Granit}}</ref> or Forbee-X, rolled on wheels and had a large screen for the majority of her egg-shaped head that was able to change colors or could be used to show diagrams. Although she usually used her wheels, she could retract them and use feet that had long steel toes to walk on uneven terrain. Her feet also included spikes that could be used to gain a better grip on the ground. Her screen was prone to flashing while using her sensors or talking. 4B-X had metal webbing that could extend between her fingers to be used as paddles. 4B-X had a shell made of shock absorbent material. 4B-X was very enthusiastic and loved to perform calculations.<ref name="Emergency in Escape Pod Four" />

{{Droid-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:4B-X.jpg|thumb|right|100px|4B-X on the cover of ''Journey Across Planet X'']]
4B-X first appeared in the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] junior novel ''[[Star Wars Science Adventures: Emergency in Escape Pod Four]]'', which was written by [[Jude Watson]] and [[K.D. Burkett]], illustrated by [[Frank Boyd Forney]], and published in [[1999]].<ref name="Emergency in Escape Pod Four" />
